{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Summer's End
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Summer's End]] is a holiday marking the end of the first half of the year.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Summer's End]] is occurring in 3 days.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c1">''City of Light'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
